widgets_values: this uses different passes to control to what extend your final output will look like your input.

the higher the CFG, the closer to the controlnet input

the lower the denoise, the closer to the ipdapter input

This generate animation

so far mm_Stabilized_high.pth + sqrt_linear(AnimateDiff)gives the most stable result, feel free to play it
the prompt here doesn't matter, because we have strong ipdapter and controlnet to navigate the result.
